cases.question: Select defensible comparable companies and calculate peer EV to EBITDA and price to earnings multiples with exclusions.
Build a peer ledger, aligned trading-multiple distributions, medians, quartiles, and a relative implied-value range.
Calculate intrinsic value with a forecast DCF, terminal growth, WACC, and sensitivity grid.
Research the industry structure, supply chain, and thematic trends without selecting valuation peers.
